summary: Iteration 42: Complete testing of iToke Legal Documents feature. All 15 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend verified via Playwright - /legal page shows 5 documents with icons, document detail view works, admin Legal tab displays all documents for editing.
critical_code_review_comments: data-testid attributes are present in legal.tsx but React Native Web may not render them as HTML attributes consistently - consider using testID prop for better Playwright compatibility
The admin Legal tab edit functionality requires clicking on a document to open edit form - this is working correctly
seed_data_creation: 5 legal documents seeded on backend startup via legal_seed.py
context_for_next_testing_agent: Legal documents feature fully implemented and tested. Backend APIs: GET /api/legal (returns all 5 docs), GET /api/legal/{doc_key} (returns single doc with title, content, version), GET /api/admin/legal (admin only - returns all docs sorted by order), PUT /api/admin/legal/{doc_key} (admin only - updates title/content). Frontend pages: /legal (public page showing 5 documents with icons, click to view detail), client help page has 'Termos e Politicas' link, establishment help page has 'Termos e Politicas' link, admin dashboard 'Legal' tab shows all 5 documents for editing.

backend_apis: GET /api/legal - Returns all 5 legal documents (200 OK)
GET /api/legal/terms_client - Returns document with title, content, version (200 OK)
GET /api/legal/privacy_lgpd - Returns LGPD privacy policy (200 OK)
GET /api/legal/legal_compliance - Returns legal compliance declaration (200 OK)
GET /api/admin/legal - Admin can view all documents sorted by order (200 OK)
GET /api/admin/legal - Requires admin role (403 for client)
PUT /api/admin/legal/privacy_lgpd - Admin can update document title (200 OK)
PUT /api/admin/legal/terms_general - Admin can update document content (200 OK)
PUT /api/admin/legal/invalid_key - Returns error for invalid key (400)
PUT /api/admin/legal - Requires admin role (403 for client)
frontend_legal_page: Page /legal loads correctly with header 'Termos e Politicas'
Shows 5 legal documents with colored icons
Document cards show title and version
Clicking document opens detail view with full content
Back button returns to document list
frontend_client_help: 'Termos e Politicas' card present in client help page (data-testid='help-terms-link')
Card shows shield icon and description 'Termos de uso, privacidade e LGPD'
frontend_establishment_help: 'Termos e Politicas' card present in establishment help page (data-testid='est-help-terms-link')
Card shows shield icon and description 'Termos de uso, privacidade e LGPD'
frontend_admin_dashboard: Admin dashboard has 'Legal' tab in tab bar
Description explains documents appear in app
All 5 documents listed with icons and versions
Each document shows 'Toque para editar' hint
Edit icon visible on each document card
